{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/60739421?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Gares95", "id": 60739421, "login": "Gares95", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYwNzM5NDIx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Gares95", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54552", "cvss": {"score": 7.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-273", "name": "Improper Check for Dropped Privileges"}], "description": "### Impact
The `_uid` option performed an incomplete privilege drop on Linux/Unix-like systems.

When `sh` was run from a process with elevated privileges, such as root, and a command was launched with `_uid=<unprivileged user>`, the child process changed its UID and primary GID but did not reset its supplementary groups. As a result, the child process could retain the parent process’s supplementary groups, potentially including privileged groups such as root, docker, disk, shadow, or sudo.

This could allow a subprocess that was expected to run with reduced privileges to access files or resources available to the original process’s supplementary groups. Users are impacted if they rely on `_uid` as a privilege boundary when launching commands from a privileged parent process.

### Patches
Upgrade to version >= 2.2.4

### Workarounds
Avoid using `_uid` when the user represents a less-privileged user.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-17T18:41:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54552"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-17T18:41:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/amoffat/sh/security/advisories/GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55", "https://github.com/amoffat/sh/releases/tag/2.2.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/amoffat/sh/security-advisories/GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/amoffat/sh", "summary": "sh _uid does not drop supplementary groups (incomplete privilege drop)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-17T18:41:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q38v-wp89-2w55", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.2.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "sh"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.2.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: sh _uid does not drop supplementary groups (incomplete privilege drop)
